zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Lacy於1170年出生在英國賀福爾艾維亞斯時，她的父親Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath11167歲，母親Rohese de Monmouth25歲。她和Sir Walter Langley至少有1個兒子。她去世於1241年2月24日在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de Lacy于1170年出生在英国賀福爾艾維亞斯时，她的父亲Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath11167岁，母亲Rohese de Monmouth25岁。她和Sir Walter Langley至少有1个儿子。她去世于1241年2月24日在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Lacy was born in 1170, in Ewias, Herefordshire, England, her father, Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath, was 11167 and her mother, Rohese de Monmouth, was 25. She had at least 1 son with Sir Walter Langley. She died on 24 February 1241, in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Lacy est née en 1170, à Ewias, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath, avait 11167 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Monmouth, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sir Walter Langley. Elle est décédée le 24 février 1241, à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Lacy 1170 in Ewias, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath 11167 und ihre Mutter Rohese de Monmouth 25. Sie hatte mit Sir Walter Langley mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 24. Februar 1241 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Lacy è nata il nel 1170 nel Ewias, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath, aveva 11167 anni e sua madre, Rohese de Monmouth, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sir Walter Langley. Morì il 24 febbraio 1241, nel Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Lacyが1170年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウィアスで生まれた時，父Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meathは11167歳，母Rohese de Monmouthは25歳であった。彼女はSir Walter Langleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1241年2月24日にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Lacy(이)가 1170년 영국 허퍼드실르 위아스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath(은)는 11167세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rohese de Monmouth(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Sir Walter Langley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 2월 24일 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Lacy nasceu em 1170, em Ewias, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath, tinha 11167 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Monmouth, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sir Walter Langley. Ela faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1241, em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Lacy родилась в 1170 г. в местности ювяс, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath было 11167 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Monmouth, 25. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sir Walter Langley. Она умерла 24 февраля 1241 г. в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de Lacy nació en 1170, en Ewias, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath, tenía 11167 años y su mamá, Rohese de Monmouth, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Sir Walter Langley. Murió el 24 de febrero de 1241, en Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, a la edad de 71 años.
